findings.description: Found 1 form(s) on the page. Ensure all form inputs have associated <label> elements for accessibility.
findings.fix_prompt: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

summary: Basic technical audit completed (AI analysis was unavailable). Found 2 issue(s) from automated checks.
bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://supabase.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [HIGH] 2 failed network request(s)
   Fix: Check that all API endpoints, images, and external resources load correctly. There are 2 failing requests to fix.

2. [LOW] 1 form(s) detected — verify labels
   Fix: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

Supabase is the Postgres development platform.
Start your project with a Postgres database, Authentication, instant APIs, Edge Functions, Realtime subscriptions, Storage, and Vector embeddings.

Start your project
Request a demo

Trusted by fast-growing companies worldwide

Postgres Database

Every project is a full Postgres database, the world's most trusted relational database.

 100% portable
 Built-in Auth with RLS
 Easy to extend
Authentication

Add user sign ups and logins,
securing your data with Row Level Security.

Edge Functions

Easily write custom code
without deploying or scaling servers.

$
supabase
functions deplo

Product
Developers

Docs

Blog

100.9K
Sign in
Start your project
Supabase Features

Everything you need to build and ship your next project.

Authentication
Database
Functions
Platform

Storage

Features selected: 79
Clear all filters
AI Integrations

Enhance applications with OpenAI and Hugging Face integrations.

Analytics Buckets (with Iceberg)

Large-scale analytics using Apache Iceberg format.

Auth Hooks

Customize authentication flows with serverless functions.

Authorization via Row Level Security

Control the data each user can access with Postgres Policies.

Auto-generated GraphQL API via pg_graphql

Fast GraphQL APIs using our custom Postgres GraphQL extension.

Auto-generated REST API via Po
